behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names CLAUDE.md, the 4-space/2-space constraints, and lists all pass-to-pass test files explicitly.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the requirements (no 4-space lines, at least one 2-space line) without dictating specific line changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests only check no line starts with exactly 4 spaces and at least one line starts with 2 spaces; multiple correct fixes would satisfy this.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Pass-to-pass tests execute pytest subprocesses and run python imports; only the f2p is text inspection which matches the task domain.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p requires both no 4-space lines and presence of 2-space lines, and pass-to-pass tests verify functionality is preserved.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Both indentation constraints and all listed preserved tests are covered by test functions.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with comment headers separating fail_to_pass and pass_to_pass sections.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task doesn't produce structured data output.

no_typos.reason: No typos observed in paths or commands.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names CLAUDE.md which is the task target, not an internal hidden file.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold solution only modifies CLAUDE.md indentation lines, a localized change.
